description: Use this API to get and set the default tabular output. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr = result_table_output(ival) ierr, ival = result_table_output()

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Output option setting. if no interactive spreadsheet device is available, report device text output will be used instead. (input; if Batch command or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if ICODE is 0; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
